81 A2200_PRVS_ASMT_RFRNC_DT A2200_PRVS_ASMT_RFRNC_DT A2200 Previous Assessment Reference Date For Significant Correction CHAR 8 This column contains the previous assessment reference date of the associated significant correction of prior quarterly or comprehensive assessment.
